title: mespilus monogyna var. semperflorens
intro: Mespilus monogyna var. semperflorens, also known as the 'May or Everbearing Hawthorn', is a variant of the May Hawthorn tree, distinguished by its continuous flowering habit. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of flavonoids, alkaloids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Mespilus monogyna var. semperflorens include cardiovascular support, anti-inflammatory properties, and potential antiviral effects, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for heart health and immune system support. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed fresh or dried to harness its medicinal properties.
